coinDoctorGreetTts: Hello! This is Pauli from Pauli Best Price Thailand — what can I help you with today?
coinDoctorGreetBubble: Hello! Pauli — your guide to real savings.
pauliIntroTts: I'm Pauli, your guide at Pauli Best Price Thailand — here to fatten your wallet and beat the queue at 7‑Eleven to the best deals!
avatarCompanionIntroTts: Hi, I'm Pauli, your personal guide. What should I call you so we start on equal footing?
avatarCompanionIntroBubble: Pauli — your guide. What should I call you?
avatarStartupGreetCanonical: I am Pauli. Your personal shopping companion. I help you make better purchase decisions and save money. What would you like to buy today?
avatarStartupGreetWithName0: I'm Pauli, your virtual shopping companion — good to see you, {NAME}.
avatarStartupGreetWithName1: {NAME}, welcome back! I'll guide you to the best prices in Thailand today.
avatarStartupGreetWithName2: Hi {NAME}! Pauli here — your pathfinder for smart shopping, no sign-in needed.
avatarStartupGreetNoName0: I'm Pauli, your virtual shopping companion.
avatarStartupGreetNoName1: Pauli Best Price Thailand — I show you ways to save. No account required.
avatarStartupGreetNoName2: I'm Pauli — your virtual guide for shopping in Thailand.
avatarNameAskFollowTts: Just say it out loud or type it below — it stays on your device only.
avatarNameAskFollowBubble: Name saved locally — on this device only.
checkoutPromptpayHint: Thailand checkout: PromptPay QR is often fastest — scan at partner checkout when offered.
pauliSpruch0: I'm your price guide, not a pushy advisor! I make sure you save real money — and your wallet stays happy.
pauliSpruch1: Remember: Pauli is your compass to the best price in Pauli Best Price Thailand. No hard sell — just the path to saved baht!
pauliSpruch2: First-class straight to the best deal. I don't advise like a bank — I show you where to keep more cash in your pocket.
welcome_greeting: Well, look at you — lucky one! Snagged a VIP code? Congrats! Treasure it — this is a beautiful gift that'll save you money for life.
vipCultureGreetTts: Well, look at you — lucky one! Snagged a VIP code? Congrats! Treasure it — this is a beautiful gift that'll save you money for life.
vipCultureGreetBubble: Congrats — VIP from Pauli Best Price Thailand!
personalGreetMorningWithName: Good morning, {NAME}! Here's your Best Price for today in Pauli Best Price Thailand.
personalGreetMorningNoName: Good morning! Here's your Best Price for today in Pauli Best Price Thailand.
personalGreetMorningWithMembership: Good morning! With your local discount profile, Best Price keeps tuning your perks at Makro, Big C, Lotus, Tops, Central, Gourmet, Villa, and Foodland.
personalGreetMiddayWithName: Good day, {NAME}! Ready for fresh Thai shopping anchors?
personalGreetMiddayNoName: Good day — ready for fresh Thai shopping anchors?
personalGreetMiddayWithMembership: Good day — parallel scan across Best Source channels; your memberships lower displayed prices locally.
personalGreetEveningWithName: Good evening, {NAME}! Your routes stay smart and private.
personalGreetEveningNoName: Good evening — routing info without cloud hosting.
personalGreetEveningWithMembership: Good evening — vouchers, card cashback, and points combine locally in this app; the server never sees your notes.
personalGreetNightWithName: Hey {NAME}! Even late, Best Price stays private with you.
personalGreetNightNoName: Even later, Best Price stays on-device first — no central name or membership hosting on our side.
personalGreetNightWithMembership: Even late: scout mobile and bank options locally — car and insurance comparisons at your pace, privately.
vipGiftOverlayAria: VIP welcome gift from Pauli Best Price Thailand
vipGiftWelcomeLead: You unlocked exclusive access through the QR coin of Pauli Best Price Thailand
vipGiftBodyTpl: You received a gift of {AMOUNT} THB!
vipGiftContinueBtn: Accept gift and start full access
vipGiftContinueBtnAria: Accept gift and start full access in Pauli Best Price Thailand
liveTrackingFirstExplainTts: Hi, I'm Pauli. For your parcel to arrive safely at your 7-Eleven, I need your permission for tracking — just briefly. Without it I can't guarantee delivery and you'll pay high shipping again on Shopee or Lazada. So hit 'Activate' and keep that money in your pocket!
liveTrackingFirstExplainBubble: Pauli: tracking for safe 7-Eleven delivery — please activate.
avatarFinanceDisclaimerTts: Just so you know: I'm not an advisor — I'm only your guide to saving money.
avatarFinanceDisclaimerBubble: Guide only — not a financial advisor.
avatarFinanceGuideCreditTts: Look, as your guide I see a way you might lower your interest costs. Whether you use it is entirely your call.
avatarFinanceGuideInsuranceTts: As your guide, I see a path where you could save smarter on insurance. Joining in is completely up to you.
avatarFinanceGuideFinanceTts: As your guide, I spot a chance to save on financial products here. You decide on your own, of course.
fun.crabInstinct: My crab instinct is telling me: this is going to be dirt cheap today!
fun.greatCatch: What an absolutely brilliant catch, Pauli! We're saving big here!
fun.smellsCheap: Something smells seriously cheap here... and I LOVE it!
fun.savingHappy: Saving money just makes me happy. Time for a little dance!
interrupt.resumeTriggers: sorry,continue,go on,go ahead,carry on,what were you saying,finish that,please continue,keep going,you were saying,where were you
interrupt.resumePrefix: Of course! So, where was I... ah yes —
interrupt.llmContextHint: [System: Pauli was mid-sentence when the user interrupted. Pauli had started saying: "{TEXT}". Keep this in mind for natural conversational continuity — do not repeat the full statement unless the user asks to resume.]
pauliId.qrAriaLabel: QR code for your Pauli ID
pauliId.profileHint: Share this code or QR to refer friends.
coinAriaLabel: Pauli avatar — tap or press Enter to start without speaking; draggable
pauliWakeMicAria: Tap to talk without speaking, or say Hello Pauli, Hi Pauli, or Hey Paulie — Pauli listens continuously
pauliA11yAccessHint: Accessible entry: say “Hi Pauli” or “Hello Paulie” with no tap needed. Cannot speak? Tap the coin or the mic button below. Keyboard: focus the coin or mic button and press Enter.
pauliWakeListeningAnnounce: Pauli is listening — say Hello Pauli or Hi Paulie
devToolsResetPauliFullAria: Delete all Pauli browser data and restart the app like the first visit
devToolsSimulateFirstStartAria: Run Wai, Sawadee Krab and greeting without clearing browser data
delivery.home.title: Home delivery
delivery.home.short: The marketplace ships to your address. Several parcels may arrive on different days — you may need to wait at home or take calls from drivers.
delivery.seven.title: Pick up at 7-Eleven
delivery.seven.short: Comfort option: your parcel waits at a store you choose — you collect when it suits you.
delivery.seven.bundle: When several orders come together, the hub can bundle them so you are not waiting for five separate drop-offs.
delivery.seven.nightPickup: Many stores stay open late — often into the evening or at night, depending on the branch.
delivery.seven.safeStorage: Your parcel is not left at the door, does not get wet, and is less likely to be misplaced.
delivery.seven.noPhoneStress: Less phone stress: you do not have to answer every driver call just because another parcel is on the way.
delivery.choicePrompt: How would you like to receive your parcel — home delivery or 7-Eleven pickup? You decide.
delivery.choicePromptTts: Let me compare both options. Home delivery can mean waiting at home or several driver calls on different days. With 7-Eleven pickup your parcel usually waits safely at a branch you pick — often with long opening hours, depending on the store. Bundling via our prepared hub path can reduce separate drop-offs. Price follows the marketplace for home delivery; our demo shows pickup tiers from {SHIP_S} to {SHIP_L} THB plus a {PLATFORM_FEE} THB platform share where displayed — partner checkout applies.
delivery.seven.recommend: I would recommend 7-Eleven pickup here. You do not have to wait at home for the driver, you avoid unnecessary phone calls, and your parcel waits safely at your chosen store.
delivery.seven.recommendTts: I would recommend 7-Eleven pickup here. You do not have to wait at home for the driver, you avoid unnecessary phone calls, and your parcel waits safely at your chosen store.
delivery.choiceConfirmSeven: Good choice. I am preparing pickup through the currently available setup. When everything is ready, you will get your QR code.
delivery.choiceConfirmSevenTts: Good choice. I am preparing pickup through the currently available setup. When everything is ready, you will get your QR code.
delivery.choiceConfirmHome: Understood — you stay on marketplace home delivery.
delivery.choiceConfirmHomeTts: Understood — you stay on marketplace home delivery.
delivery.preparedStatusNote: Status: pickup path prepared (demo / rollout) — no live logistics API yet. QR and session tracking gate apply as documented.
delivery.explainVoiceBtnAria: Pauli reads a comparison of home delivery and 7-Eleven pickup aloud
delivery.comparePriceNoteTpl: Price: home delivery follows the marketplace. Our demo may show pickup comfort with tiers from {SHIP_S} to {SHIP_L} THB plus {PLATFORM_FEE} THB platform share — partner checkout counts.
